score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable — instructional content, not performance attempt

confidence_rationale: This video is clearly classified as INSTRUCTIONAL content. It contains lecture segments, interviews with faculty, facility tours, group demonstrations, and educational meeting footage. There is NO individual trainee performing a timed peg transfer task. While peg transfer equipment is briefly visible in frame 8-9, it appears only as part of a demonstration or instructional overview, not as an active performance that can be scored.
cannot_determine: Completion time — no timed performance attempt is visible
Individual penalty deductions — no scorable task execution
Actual task performance — video is educational/documentary in nature

demonstrated_techniques: Proper handling of Maryland dissectors in laparoscopic context
Overview of peg transfer trainer setup and equipment
Facility and training program organization for surgical skills
verbal_cues: Educational narration implied from classroom/lecture settings
Expert interviews discussing surgical training and program curricula

scoring_decision: NO SCORE. This video does not contain a scorable performance of the peg transfer task. It is an educational/instructional program featuring interviews, lectures, facility tours, and brief equipment demonstrations. To receive a score, a video must show an individual trainee performing the complete peg transfer task (transfer all six objects from nondominant to dominant side, then reverse) within the 300-second time window, with clear start and stop markers.
